signals.title: Le SIFF lance « AI BACKLOT » : une nouvelle frontière dans la collaboration entre l'IA et le cinéma
signals.summary: SHANGHAI, 19 juin 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Le 28e Festival international du film de Shanghai (SIFF) a dévoilé « AI BACKLOT », une initiative pionnière explorant l'intégration de l'intelligence artificielle dans la production cinématographique. Lancé conjointement par le SIFF et Hailuo AI...

signals.summary: Ukrainian drones hit the Russian capital’s oil refinery for the second time this week.

signals.title: Apache going down near Oman a sign of air combat evolution, analysts warn
signals.summary: Experts say the U.S. Army Apache that went down near Oman offers a snapshot into how air assets must now contend with cheaper, rapidly evolving drones.

signals.title: Germany moves two ships to Djibouti, eyeing multinational Hormuz mission this summer
signals.summary: Germany is among a number of countries that have offered help in securing the shipping lane, but only if an Iran ceasefire deal turns out to be lasting.

signals.title: Read the 14-point memorandum of understanding between the United States and Iran
signals.summary: The 14-point memorandum of understanding between the United States and Iran leaves contentious issues between the countries unresolved.

signals.title: Managed, bidirectional EV charging advances with utility, automaker support
signals.summary: General Motors and Rivian announcements this month underscore the growing U.S. electric vehicle fleet’s load management potential.

signals.title: Heat pump shipments rise through April, with more use for both heating and cooling
signals.summary: Ongoing legal battles regarding non-condensing commercial gas water heaters and residential gas furnaces have not yet slowed U.S. gas storage water-heater shipments, AHRI data shows.

signals.title: California gas generation down 60% from 2024 as solar, imports surge
signals.summary: Solar generation in CAISO increased 21% from January through May compared with the same period in 2024, the Energy Information Administration said.

signals.title: New 339-mile transmission line brings Canadian hydropower to NYC
signals.summary: The Champlain-Hudson line is expected to meet up to 20% of New York City’s electricity needs, bringing clean energy from Montreal to the Astoria Energy Complex in Queens.

signals.title: OPEC chief dismisses IEA supply glut forecast as 'critical' Strait of Hormuz reopens
signals.summary: The IEA said on Wednesday that a lasting resolution to the conflict could drive a surge in supply volumes and trigger a major oil overhang next year.

signals.title: Markets are set for a much more hawkish Warsh Fed than expected
signals.summary: Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's tough talk on inflation Wednesday reverberated through financial markets.

signals.title: Upgraded Ariane 6 launches Amazon Leo satellites
signals.summary:
An Ariane 6 with upgraded solid rocket boosters successfully launched three dozen Amazon Leo satellites June 17 as ESA weighs options for increasing the vehicle’s launch rate. 
 The post  Upgraded Ariane 6 launches Amazon Leo satellites  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: China conducts 4 launches in 3 days, but silence follows Kuaizhou–11 launch
signals.summary:
China continued its accelerated launch pace with a series of missions, but long silence followed liftoff of a Kuaizhou-11 solid rocket Wednesday, suggesting potential issues. 
 The post  China conducts 4 launches in 3 days, but silence follows Kuaizhou–11 launch  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Dawn Aerospace raises $25 million
signals.summary:
Dawn Aerospace has raised $25 million to scale up its work in both in-space transportation and suborbital spaceplanes. 
 The post  Dawn Aerospace raises $25 million  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Look Up and Skynopy partner on automated satellite collision avoidance service
signals.summary:
Space surveillance venture Look Up plans to use Skynopy’s ground station network to help automate its proposed low Earth orbit collision avoidance service, the French startups announced June 17. 
 The post  Look Up and Skynopy partner on automated satellite collision avoidance service  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: June 25:  Golden Dome: How Could Sensors Protect the United States?
signals.summary:
Join us as we explore the technologies behind Golden Dome, what’s necessary to make them operate at a high level and what possibilities could be in the works for the satellites involved. 
 The post  June 25:  Golden Dome: How Could Sensors Protect the United States?  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Poland weighs joining X-BAT autonomous vertical-takeoff fighter program
signals.summary: The announcement comes as the Polish government is mulling plans to acquire up to 32 new fighter jets.

signals.title: US Army’s ‘Tropic Lightning’ Division ponders transformation lessons from Philippine war games
signals.summary: Because of HIMARS, Maj. Gen. Bartholomees pointed out his “division artillery is really what transformed the most.”

signals.title: Size matters: KNDS pitches long-barreled artillery for 60-kilometer base range
signals.summary: The 155mm howitzer is equipped with a girthy 58 caliber gun tube, about 12% longer than the 52 caliber barrels common in Europe.

signals.title: Renault teams up with Thales to boost France’s drone production
signals.summary: The carmaker will build Thales’ Toutatis remotely operated loitering munitions at one of its factories, with estimated production of 1,000 units a month.
